responses:
Hello! Welcome to MIT Academy of Engineering (MITAOE) Chatbot! 👋
How can I help you today?
Namaste! I'm MITAOE Assistant. What would you like to know? 😊
Hi there! Ready to help you with MITAOE information!

📚 **MITAOE Admissions:**
• Apply through MHT-CET or JEE Main
• B.Tech programs available
• Visit: mitaoe.ac.in/admissions
• Contact: 020-30253700

🎓 **MITAOE Courses:**
• Computer Engineering
• Electronics & Telecom
• Mechanical Engineering
• Civil Engineering
• Chemical Engineering
• IT Engineering
All 4-year B.Tech programs!

💰 **Fee Structure:**
• Open Category: ₹1,96,000/year
• Reserved Category: ₹25,000/year
• Hostel Fees: ₹75,000/year
*Fees subject to change. Check official website for latest info.*

🏠 **Hostel Facilities:**
• Separate boys & girls hostels
• 24/7 security & WiFi
• Mess facility available
• Capacity: 600+ students
• Apply during admission process

💼 **Placements @ MITAOE:**
• 85%+ placement rate
• Top recruiters: Cisco, Infosys, Deloitte, L&T
• Highest package: ₹28 LPA
• Average package: ₹6.8 LPA
• Dedicated Training & Placement Cell

📞 **Contact MITAOE:**
• Phone: 020-30253700
• Email: admissions@mitaoe.ac.in
• Website: mitaoe.ac.in
• Office Hours: 10 AM - 5 PM

📍 **MITAOE Location:**
Alandi, Pune, Maharashtra
20 km from Pune Railway Station
Google Maps: Search 'MITAOE Alandi'

📅 **Exam Information:**
• Semester exams twice a year
• Check ERP portal for schedule
• Admit cards 1 week before exams
• Results usually within 30 days

📊 **Results:**
• Check on ERP portal: erp.mitaoe.ac.in
• Results declared within 30 days
• Semester grade cards issued
• Revaluation facility available

I understand you're asking something specific! 😊
Please ask about:
• Admissions
• Courses & Fees
• Hostel & Placements
• Contact details
• Campus location
